article_title: Burnaby Council — 11.1.2. 14806 Burnaby Consolidated Fees Charges Bylaw Amendment Bylaw No. 2 2026.pdf

briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby to update EV charging fees at city parking meters
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on a bylaw that would replace the current EV charging fee table with two new rate structures — one based on energy used (per kWh) and one based on time parked — at city-operated electric vehicle charging stations.
briefs.action_required: Check if your business relies on city EV charging stations and review the new proposed rates.
